step_rationale: Circulating miRNA biomarker released during acute myocardial infarction and cardiomyocyte damage.
mechanism: Circulating miR-181a reflects myocardial necrosis and inflammatory response in acute MI.

references.title: Circulating miR-181a as a Potential Novel Biomarker for Diagnosis of Acute Myocardial Infarction.
references.journal: Cellular physiology and biochemistry : international journal of experimental cellular physiology, biochemistry, and pharmacology
